textByHashes.d6d5776ff9db517c226d491d62c939ed0eb094a3: Greetings human. I am Darcor quo Narga, a guardian for the Kahlith. Have you come to serve the balance?
textByHashes.48e38ae27c2c190d4f98e68b6f8ee48512fb22b9: Then you should speak to Konar quo Maten. She will guide you.
textByHashes.2a1074e2b7a3db044a5eed43d7bf1f970f7b4b93: A shame. You are a bringer of death, you could be of great use to the balance.
textByHashes.c3411b6a4eb80f7273c6bdeaa0617231bd6a35b6: Then you should speak with Xorrah quo Sihar. He will show you the way.
